global.title: Tesla Robotaxi expansion, heavy duty EVs, and last week’s pain at the pump
global.summary: On today’s pumped-up episode of Quick Charge, we notice how funny it is that Tesla makes a big Robotaxi announcement every time the TSLA earnings call looks like a disappointment. more…

global.title: Tesla Cybertruck becomes first AC vehicle-to-grid asset in California through PG&E
global.summary: PG&E and Tesla have announced that the Cybertruck is now approved to sell power back to California’s grid through the utility’s residential Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) pilot program. The approval comes with up to $4,500 in incentives toward equipment and installation costs. What makes this notable:

global.title: Tesla settles another wrongful death lawsuit, but not about Autopilot this time
global.summary: Tesla has settled a wrongful death lawsuit filed by the family of an 18-year-old passenger killed in a 116 mph crash in Fort Lauderdale.Plaintiffs alleged that a Tesla technician disabled a speed limiter without parental consent. The settlement, with undisclosed terms, was confirmed Monday just as j

global.title: Isuzu launches its first electric pickup in the UK, but it’s not cheap
global.summary: While Toyota is preparing to launch the Hilux BEV in the UK, another Japanese electric pickup is now on sale. The Isuzu D-MAX EV can tow over 7,700 lbs, wade through close to 24″ (600 mm) of water, and it even has a dedicated Rough Terrain Mode for off-roading. However, it’s not cheap. more…

global.title: Hot and ready: Mercedes is taking orders for its new eArocs 400 vocational truck
global.summary: First shown at last year’s Bauma construction expo, the all-new Mercedes-Benz eActros promised great range, awesome performance, and massive payload capacities from its new, HD vocational electric semi truck. Now, the company is ready to take orders. more…

global.title: BYD is now upgrading some of its top selling EVs with 5-min flash charging
global.summary: BYD launched its new Flash Charging system, enabling EV charging in as little as 5 minutes, in luxury vehicles like the Denza Z9 GT. Now, it’s set to roll out to some of its best sellers. more…

global.title: Nissan’s first EV powered by solid-state batteries is on track for 2028
global.summary: During a briefing on Monday, Nissan revealed it had achieved a new milestone as it aims to launch its first vehicles powered by all-solid-state EV batteries by 2028. more…

global.title: Bluetti Elite 10 power station + 60W solar panel hits $219, Worx string trimmer + leaf blower combo $129, Aventon e-bikes, more
global.summary: Today’s 9to5Toys Green Deals is outfitted with BLUETTI’s compact Elite 10 128Wh power station and 60W solar panel bundle, the exact Worx string trimmer and leaf blower combo I use to tidy up my own lawn, as well as Aventon’s Aventure 3 e-bike with smart features at its low. These are just a few of t

global.title: Hyundai unveils the IONIQ 3 with class-leading range and a new infotainment [Images]
global.summary: The IONIQ 3 is Hyundai’s first compact electric vehicle under the series and a smaller, more affordable sibling to the IONIQ 5. more…

global.title: Europe’s EV sales surge just hit 51% – and oil is the reason why
global.summary: Europe’s EV sales just surged 51% last month, and oil is a big reason why. more…
